sql_array: CREATE TABLE time_data (id INT, start_time TIME, end_time TIME);
INSERT INTO time_data VALUES (1, TIME '01:00:00', TIME '05:00:00');
INSERT INTO time_data VALUES (2, TIME '02:00:00', TIME '06:30:30');
INSERT INTO time_data VALUES (3, TIME '12:15:00', TIME '15:45:00');
SELECT id, date_diff('hour', start_time, end_time) * 60 AS minutes_difference FROM time_data;
SELECT id, date_diff('hour', start_time, TIME '23:59:59') * 30 as scaled_diff FROM time_data WHERE end_time IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, (SELECT date_diff('hour', start_time, end_time) * 2 FROM time_data WHERE id = t.id) AS doubled_diff FROM time_data t;
CREATE TABLE additional_data (data_time TIME, factor INT);

SELECT td.id, ad.factor, date_diff('hour', td.start_time, ad.data_time) * ad.factor AS scaled_hour_diff FROM time_data td JOIN additional_data ad ON date_diff('hour', td.start_time, ad.data_time) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, date_diff('hour', NULL, end_time) AS null_difference FROM time_data;
SELECT id, (date_diff('hour', start_time, end_time) + (2 * date_diff('hour', start_time, TIME '02:00:00'))) AS complex_diff FROM time_data;
SELECT id, date_diff('hour', start_time, end_time * 0) AS edge_case_diff FROM time_data WHERE end_time IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, CASE WHEN (date_diff('hour', start_time, end_time) > 0) THEN date_diff('hour', start_time, end_time) * 3 ELSE 0 END AS conditional_diff FROM time_data;

SELECT id, start_time, end_time, date_diff('hour', start_time, end_time) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM time_data d WHERE d.start_time = start_time) AS aggregated_diff FROM time_data GROUP BY start_time, end_time HAVING aggregated_diff > 1;
SELECT id, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY start_time) AS count_partition, date_diff('hour', start_time, end_time) AS hour_diff FROM time_data;
ALTER TABLE time_data ADD COLUMN remarks VARCHAR;
UPDATE time_data SET remarks = 'Checked' WHERE end_time IS NOT NULL;
